message:
feat: implement core TOON encode/decode library

Add spec-compliant TOON encoding and decoding with streaming support:

Encoding pipeline (src/encode/):
- encoders.rs: Main encode logic with tabular/list/inline array selection
- folding.rs: Safe key folding for dotted path optimization
- normalize.rs: JSON value normalization (BigInt, Date, Set/Map handling)
- primitives.rs: Primitive value encoding (strings, numbers, booleans)
- replacer.rs: Custom replacer function support

Decoding pipeline (src/decode/):
- decoders.rs: Main decode logic with strict/non-strict modes
- parser.rs: TOON line parsing and tokenization
- scanner.rs: Character-level scanning and lookahead
- event_builder.rs: Streaming event construction
- expand.rs: Dotted key path expansion
- validation.rs: Strict mode validation rules

Shared utilities (src/shared/):
- constants.rs: Format constants and delimiters
- string_utils.rs: String escaping and quoting
- literal_utils.rs: Literal parsing helpers
- validation.rs: Common validation functions

Core modules:
- lib.rs: Public API exports (encode, decode functions)
- options.rs: EncodeOptions and DecodeOptions configuration
- error.rs: ToonError type with context and recovery hints

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
